policies.rule: automation.workspaceId must equal execution.workspaceId and target owner workspaceId
target workflow or action must exist and be active in the workspace registry
forbid a second active run for the same automation unless overlapPolicy explicitly allows it
consequential occurrences require a stable occurrence key before dispatch
scheduling never satisfies or removes a Founder approval gate
catch-up execution cannot exceed maxCatchUpRuns and cannot compress consequential approvals
a true condition cannot dispatch another run during the configured cooldown
schedule metadata and notifications cannot contain secrets, tokens, credentials, or protected security material
